prompt: A refined Japanese travel guide magazine cover illustration in a soft watercolor-and-ink editorial style, vertical A4 layout, airy pastel palette, elegant tourism-poster composition. The cover headline is dominated by very large serif blue text reading IBARAKI, with large Japanese title text below reading "茨城県 旅行ガイド" and a pale pink cursive English subtitle reading "Ibaraki Travel Guide". At the top left, include two lines of small Japanese copy about nature, history, scenery, and gourmet travel in Ibaraki, accented with a tiny pink cherry blossom icon. At the top right, place a large circular badge with fine dotted border containing Japanese text and the phrase "完全保存版" in the center with a small ribbon flourish underneath. The main subject is a young Japanese woman shown from the chest up, placed slightly right of center, facing left in three-quarter view. She has a chin-length wavy bob in deep dark brown to black, delicate loose strands, soft natural texture, and a calm neutral expression. She wears a light blue cardigan over a white ruffled blouse with a high gathered neckline, plus a thin beige shoulder bag strap. Her face is intentionally obscured by a plain vertical rectangular gray censor block centered over the face area. Surround her with a collage of iconic Ibaraki scenery blended seamlessly into the cover art: a vast field of blue nemophila flowers across rolling hills in the upper right with a Ferris wheel in the distance and tiny visitors along the ridge; a traditional temple or pavilion among pink cherry blossoms at mid-right; a bright waterfall and landscaped stream at lower right; a torii gate standing in shallow ocean water at sunset in the lower left; and a mountain landscape near the bottom left center. Add abundant blue flowers in the foreground along the bottom edge and soft pink cherry blossoms framing the right side. Along the left side, include exactly 7 vertically stacked destination list entries in Japanese, each with a colored heading line and smaller descriptive subtext: "国営ひたち海浜公園", "偕楽園", "袋田の滝", "大洗磯前神社", "筑波山", "水郷・霞ヶ浦", and "グルメ・カフェ・おみやげ". At the lower left, place a blue circular badge with white Japanese text reading "モデルコース 4" and smaller itinerary copy below. At the lower right, include exactly 3 horizontal white label tabs with Japanese text and small icons: "絶景スポット", "ご当地グルメ", and "おみやげセレクション". Add a pink ribbon banner near the bottom right with small Japanese promotional text. Use a clean white background for the upper left, elegant magazine typography, delicate linework, dreamy spring atmosphere, polished tourism-cover design, high detail, premium print look.
